name: Slime Climber
short_description: A climbing game, with slime physics. Jump between platforms to get to the top, mistakes are expensive and will set you back on your mission.
detailed_description:
In this game you will find a journey of not only, joy, but also failure, frustration and determination. Using your mouse, do your best to aim, select the power and make the slime jump, higher and higher. A game where the simplest failure can lead to a massive setback.

It's a simple yet deceptively hard game, where your skills in aiming, patience and determination will be tested.

    [*Achievements*All new art for this game*Easy to understand, hard to master*An excellent way to test your patience*Easy to play one handed, perfect for petting a cat at the same time]
